subject: a humanoid figure piloting a hang-glider kite device through a canyon gap, backlit by golden light
description: A humanoid figure hangs from a wooden-and-fabric hang-glider/kite apparatus, flying through a narrow gap between tall orange-brown rock formations. The device has a geometric wooden frame with stretched fabric panels. The light source is behind, casting a warm golden glow through the arch of rock. The figure is small relative to the surrounding canyon walls, emphasizing the scale of the terrain. The composition is a wide shot through the canyon gap.
foreground: humanoid figure on hang-glider kite device between canyon rock walls
background: golden backlit sky through canyon arch, orange rock formations
